canvas.$description: Loom Grey — primary background. The paper on which the outfit is laid.

ink.$description: Vat Indigo — primary text + the one dark contextual surface (conversion screen). Never a page default.

accent-primary.$description: Rani Pink — CTAs, confidence badge, Stitch Line.

accent-primary-press.$description: Rani Pink at -15% lightness. Used only for active/pressed states on accent-primary elements.

accent-warm.$description: Haldi Gold — badges, highlights. Focus rings use accent-warm-glow, not this directly.

accent-warm-glow.$description: Haldi Gold at 35% opacity — focus ring blur/glow only. Never a hard 2px outline.

hairline.$description: Raw Thread — borders, dividers, tape ticks.

surface-elevated.$description: Cards lifted off canvas on hover/drag. Slightly warmer than canvas.

scrim.$description: Sheet/modal backdrop — derived from ink. Used behind bottom sheets in the manual attribute flow.

shimmer-base.$description: Skeleton loading base — warm, never generic grey.

shimmer-sweep.$description: Skeleton loading sweep highlight — warm, never generic grey.

display.$description: Variable, soft axis. Hero moments only — not for UI controls or body copy.

body.$description: Every control, label, paragraph, and UI element.

mono.$description: Confidence %, counters, prices, measurements, OTP countdown. Always tabular-nums.

display-l.$description: Fraunces / -2% tracking. Homepage hero, Welcome headline.

display-s.$description: Fraunces / -1% tracking. Section headers, Stylist's Notes panel title.

body-l.$description: General Sans / 1.5 line-height. Lead body copy.

body.$description: General Sans / 1.5 line-height. Standard body copy.

caption.$description: General Sans / 1.4 line-height. Helper text, chip labels.

mono.$description: Fragment Mono / tabular-nums. All numeric/data contexts.

duration.$description: Settle — button press, card lift. The floor every control meets.
Responsive — garment crossfade, badge count-up, slider fill. Must feel instant.

easing.$description: Responsive easing. Snappy start, smooth settle.

duration.$description: Ambient — pre-reveal badge pulse, tape tick glow. Looped.

max-delta.$description: Maximum scale/opacity delta for ambient. Felt, not seen.

easing.$description: Custom per Stitch Line spec. One use only — never repurposed.

pressable.$description: Shared primitive. Every tappable element composes this. Do not hand-roll press states.

guest-convert-sheet.$description: Dark mode exception — signals the identity crossing moment. Zero Tailor's Bench decoration.
